message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User

participant "uic : UIController" as uic
participant "UIExt : UIExtension" as UIExt

User -> UIExt : select macro window

create participant "mp : MacrosPanel" as mp
UIExt -> mp : create(uic)

User -> mp : Choose write a script

create participant "sui : ScriptUI" as sui
mp -> sui : create(uic)

@enduml
```
